header.description: Dynamically track time saved based on the workflow’s execution path and the number of items processed

notice.displayName: For each run, time saved is the sum of all Time Saved nodes that execute. Use this when different execution paths or items save different amounts of time.

once.description: Counts minutes saved once for all input items

perItem.description: Multiply minutes saved by the number of input items

minutesSaved.description: Number of minutes saved by this workflow execution
